title: corylus cornuta
intro: Corylus cornuta, also known as the Beaked Hazelnut, is a deciduous shrub native to eastern North America, characterized by its distinctive beaked fruit capsule and edible nuts. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and protect against infections. The health benefits of Corylus cornuta include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and improve cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its nuts can be used as a food source, making it a valuable resource in herbal medicine and natural health.
